name: Vicente Ricardo Pau Valero
title: Senior System Administrator & Conversational AI Developer

profile.description: IT professional with 25+ years of uninterrupted experience in systems administration, critical infrastructure and software development. Dual profile: enterprise infrastructure in high-availability environments — hospitals, national data centres, regional health networks — combined with modern full-stack development and conversational AI engineering. EU citizen available for remote positions with full CET business hours overlap. Seeking organisations that share values of technical precision, reliability and sustained quality.

softSkills: Autonomous decision-making in critical environments without direct supervision
Proactive initiative — self-proposed improvements without prior request
C1 professional English for technical communication and international escalations
Technical documentation as a systematic practice, not an afterthought
Continuous learning sustained alongside full-time employment

education.title: Higher National Diploma in Web Application Development (DAW)
education.institution: IES Jaume II el Just — Tabernes de la Valldigna, Valencia, Spain — EQF Level 5 | 120 ECTS | Europass
education.description: Official qualification at EQF Level 5 with Europass Supplement, recognised across the European Union. Core modules: client and server-side web development (JavaScript, PHP, Node.js), web application deployment, accessible interface design (HTML5, CSS3), relational databases and ERP/CRM with Odoo.

education.title: Higher National Diploma in Multiplatform Application Development (DAM)
education.institution: IES Jaume II el Just — Tabernes de la Valldigna, Valencia, Spain — EQF Level 5 | 120 ECTS | Europass
education.description: Official qualification at EQF Level 5 with Europass Supplement, recognised across the European Union. Core modules: object-oriented programming in Java, mobile development (Android/Kotlin, Flutter/Dart), data access with Hibernate and ORM, ERP/CRM Odoo, TDD and UML. Completed whilst working full-time.

education.title: React.js Bootcamp
education.description: Intensive training in React.js: functional components, hooks, state management with Redux, REST API integration and component testing.

education.title: Higher Vocational Certificate in IT Management (FPII)
education.description: Formal foundation of the technical career. Programming fundamentals, operating systems, networking and business management systems.

experience.title: Conversational AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer
experience.description: Designs, develops and deploys telephone conversational AI agents built on the Claude API (Anthropic) for clients across multiple sectors. Manages 4 production agents handling tens of simultaneous calls. Builds the client metrics dashboard with React, Python and PostgreSQL, and implements business-process automations via self-hosted n8n. Sole technical owner of the product: architecture, development, testing and deployments.

experience.title: Software Developer — DAW Internship (Project Minichef)
experience.description: Engineered Minichef end-to-end — a voice AI assistant for professional kitchens. Full Python pipeline: Vosk (real-time STT) → Groq LLM → gTTS + Pygame (TTS), with MySQL backend and complete voice-operated CRUD. The project was adopted and actively continued by the company after the internship.

experience.title: IT Support Engineer — Healthcare Network Infrastructure
experience.description: Technical support for the critical network infrastructure of 25 health departments across the Valencian Community (provinces of Alicante, Castellón and Valencia). Managed Cisco and Fortigate routers, firewalls and VPNs. Ticket volume of ~100/month under normal conditions, scaling to 300–400 during crises. Sole English-speaking engineer on a 6-person team: exclusively responsible for all technical communications in English with Cisco and Fortigate.

experience.title: IT Technician & Systems Administrator
experience.description: Administered a Cisco network with ~350 devices and VLANs at one of Europe's largest B2B e-commerce wholesalers. Self-proposed and deployed OCS Inventory NG (the organisation's first automated IT inventory system) and Zabbix (its first infrastructure monitoring system), both approved on a zero-cost basis. Recovered MySQL administrator access on AWS via --skip-grant-tables with zero data loss when no recovery procedure existed.

experience.title: IT Support Specialist — Ford European LLP
experience.description: Fully remote IT support for Ford plants in Spain, Germany, UK and Hungary, plus ~15 virtualised environments in India. Administered Active Directory at European scale, VPNs and plant databases. Automated daily backup verification and alerting in Java/Node.js, eliminating a recurring manual review task.

experience.title: L2 Support Technician & Systems Administrator
experience.description: Technical support for 3,000+ optical retail clients across Spain on the company's proprietary ERP platform. Administered Zabbix, VMware ESXi and Amazon AWS. Participated in Oracle SQL database migrations. Agile methodology with Jira and Scrum in collaboration with UPV's ITI research institute.

experience.title: IT Systems Administrator
experience.description: Sole IT responsible for a food-industry company of ~200 employees. Built the organisation's complete IT security infrastructure from zero: Cisco and Sophos firewalls in a company that had no security systems whatsoever. Led the end-to-end Microsoft Dynamics 365 ERP adoption in direct coordination with Microsoft. Redesigned the corporate data centre, achieving a 60% improvement in infrastructure performance.

experience.title: IT Operator — National Data Centre
experience.description: Operated the national CPD serving ~1,500 Mercadona stores across Spain and 15,000+ monitored entities. Tools: HP OVO, Axway Automaton, HP Dataprotector, CommVault. Daily Level-2 incident management in a zero-downtime environment with equipment valued above EUR 1M per unit.

experience.title: IT Systems Administrator & Technician
experience.description: IT support for ~15 concurrent clients across the south of England: NHS hospitals, restaurant and hotel chains, automotive workshops. Worked entirely in English throughout. Installed and configured servers, Active Directory, Terminal Server and Citrix across multiple client sites. Two years of international experience that consolidated English to C1 professional level.

experience.title: Systems Administrator & Web Developer
experience.description: Remote management of 4 web clients during a year based in New Zealand. Development using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js and MySQL. FTP server administration. First full remote working experience in an international context.

experience.title: IT Systems Technician — Night Shift
experience.description: Sole overnight IT responsible for Spain's first privately managed public hospital: 301 beds, 1,200 staff. Autonomous management of Citrix, Active Directory, Terminal Server, firewalls and critical backups transmitted to the regional health authority. Resolved a mass backup failure independently during a night shift in a mission-critical environment.

portfolio.title: Minichef — Voice AI Assistant for Professional Kitchens
portfolio.description: Voice-operated conversational AI assistant for professional kitchen management. Full voice-to-voice pipeline: real-time speech recognition → LLM processing → spoken response. Complete voice-operated CRUD across inventory, recipes and suppliers. Developed entirely solo during the DAW internship; actively continued by the company afterwards.

portfolio.title: Client Metrics Dashboard — Sfera-AI
portfolio.description: Web dashboard for Sfera-AI clients showing real-time AI agent performance: call volume, resolution rates, average handling time and configurable business metrics per client.

portfolio.title: Telephone Conversational AI Agents
portfolio.description: Four production telephone AI agents serving clients across multiple sectors, capable of handling tens of simultaneous calls with autonomous resolution. Integrated with follow-up automations: email, WhatsApp, SMS and automatic appointment scheduling via n8n.

portfolio.title: OCS Inventory + Zabbix Deployment — BigBuy
portfolio.description: Self-proposed, designed and deployed the first IT asset management and infrastructure monitoring systems at BigBuy, one of Europe's largest B2B e-commerce wholesalers (~350 employees). Both initiatives were presented, approved and executed without prior request.

contact.message: Looking for a senior IT profile with experience in critical infrastructure and conversational AI for a remote position? Get in touch directly or use the chatbot to explore my background in detail.
